overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic industrial dock area with massive metal structures, pipes, and shipping containers. The player moves from an enclosed industrial platform through narrow passages to an open waterfront overlooking a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock platform with shipping containers

events.description: ascending metal stairs from lower platform to upper walkway

agents.ego_description: walking forward through industrial dock area, ascending stairs and navigating around containers

entered.detail: red-brown rusted steel support beams forming overhead structure
bright orange rectangular cargo containers stacked on platform
metal grated stairs leading up to higher platform level
futuristic high-rise buildings with pink and blue neon signage visible in background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial dock platform with rusted metal framework overhead and orange shipping containers. The camera ascends metal stairs, revealing a concrete walkway with distant neon-lit skyscrapers visible between industrial structures. The environment is devoid of people, emphasizing the gritty industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor between massive concrete pillars

events.description: moving from open platform into corridor lined with large industrial pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial corridor, passing large concrete pillars and blue ladders

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete support pillars with blue structural accents
vertical blue metal ladders attached to concrete pillars
white triangular warning sign with letter A painted on concrete wall
green industrial waste containers lined along left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial corridor flanked by massive concrete pillars with blue ladders. The camera moves forward past green dumpsters and a prominent warning sign, with the distant neon city still visible to the left. The environment feels enclosed and industrial, with pipes and metal walkways overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between industrial pillars leading to waterfront

events.description: emerging from dark narrow passage into bright sunlight at waterfront overlook
exiting enclosed industrial area onto open waterfront balcony with city view

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight passage between pillars, then emerging to overlook waterfront and cityscape

entered.detail: tight corridor between massive concrete pillars with graffiti on walls
piles of blue and white garbage bags and cardboard debris accumulated on platform
metal safety railing along edge of waterfront overlook
murky green water of industrial canal or harbor
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark narrow passage between massive pillars, then emerges into bright sunlight onto a waterfront overlook. Trash bags and debris litter the platform near a metal railing overlooking the water. The view opens up to reveal a stunning cyberpunk city skyline with towering neon-lit buildings across the canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with massive industrial piping and neon city backdrop

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal massive vertical industrial pipes and structures against sky

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront path, looking up at massive industrial infrastructure and neon signs

entered.detail: large industrial exhaust pipes and cylindrical structures with rust and metal detailing
tall blue cylindrical industrial tanks with weathered paint and rust spots
elevated enclosed walkway connecting buildings with glass windows
large red neon corporate signage on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the waterfront walkway with massive vertical industrial pipes dominating the foreground. The camera tilts up to reveal the scale of the industrial complex against a bright blue sky, with a skybridge walkway visible overhead. The neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape remains visible across the water, creating a striking contrast between industrial decay and futuristic opulence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial dock that gradually opens into a sweeping vista of a futuristic neon cityscape. It begins on a rusted metal platform among orange shipping containers, ascending stairs to a concrete walkway where distant skyscrapers first peek through the industrial framework. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into an enclosed corridor flanked by massive concrete pillars and blue ladders, passing green dumpsters and warning signs under a canopy of overhead pipes. The scene then shifts from this dark, narrow passage into bright sunlight as the camera emerges onto a debris-strewn waterfront overlook, revealing a stunning skyline of towering neon buildings across a canal. Finally, the view expands along the waterfront walkway, tilting upward past massive vertical pipes toward a bright blue sky and overhead skybridge to contrast the industrial decay with the opulence of the distant city.
